spec.rawSql: SELECT "time", speed FROM vehicle_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000
SELECT "time", rpm FROM vehicle_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000
SELECT "time", gforce_lateral, gforce_longitudinal, gforce_vertical FROM motion_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000
SELECT "time", velocity_x, velocity_y, velocity_z FROM motion_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000

spec.title: brake/throttle
spec.description: brake and throttle as a percentage of pedal depressed

spec.rawSql: SELECT "time", throttle, -brake as brake FROM vehicle_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000

SELECT "time", fl_brake_temp AS "front left", fr_brake_temp AS "front right", bl_brake_temp AS "back left", br_brake_temp AS "back right" FROM vehicle_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000
SELECT "time", yaw FROM motion_data WHERE session_id = '$session_id' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 3000

spec.name: session_id
spec.label: Session ID
spec.description: ID of the session, e.g. free practise, race, time-trial

spec.rawSql: SELECT session_id FROM vehicle_data GROUP BY session_id LIMIT 50

spec.name: driver_ID
spec.label: Driver ID
spec.description: ID of the driver whose telemetry will be shown.
